Sorolan Sakki

Welcome to Sorola's website!


What is sorola.fi?


Sorola offers versatile and secure IT tools to make everyday life easier. On our site you'll find, among other things, a fast link shortener, an easy temporary file sharing service, and clear technical guides for different software and tools.

We keep building new solutions that make your digital everyday life smoother. You can also explore Markus Sorola's CV and portfolio if you're looking for a capable contributor for IT projects.

Sorola links

A collection of family pages, technical guides, and useful information.

📄 Markus's CVs 💼 Markus's contact details 💼 Sorola guides 🚂 Tave's plastic scale models group 🛡️ Privacy policies

Tools and apps

Self-built, fast, ad-free helpers for everyday digital life.
